SPAWN 40 36
NPC 45 36 I am a wizard of old. If you come with me you will never have to worry about your master again and I will take you on an adventure. My name is Maiteln. Will you come with me?
NPC 11 14 Boy! Get back to your chores this instant or you will be punished!
DOOR 11 18 madrian_masters_house door_masters_exit
DOOR 39 32 madrian_inn door_inn_exit
DOOR 50 99 __exit__ madrian_exit
